subject: Pre-order status for Nora Clement autumn title

description: My Tomas Bernhard order was supposed to arrive last week.

subject: Request for gift wrapping on order
description: Can you gift wrap my order? It is a birthday present.

description: Can I get a proper invoice for my last order? I need it for work expenses.
